name: insurance brokers managing 10-20 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 policies/month, manual review causes missed coverage gaps. We automate monitoring instead of manual review of policy documents.
problem_solved: Identifying coverage gaps in insurance policies
